synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23048 Important: Oracle Linux 8 tomcat security update
description:
[1:9.0.87-1.7]
- Resolves: RHEL-124507
tomcat: Directory traversal via rewrite with possible RCE (CVE-2025-55752)
- Resolves: RHEL-91743
tomcat: Bypass of rules in Rewrite Valve (CVE-2025-31651)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23048

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23048.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
tomcat-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-admin-webapps-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-docs-webapp-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-el-3.0-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-jsp-2.3-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-lib-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-servlet-4.0-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-webapps-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
tomcat-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-admin-webapps-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-docs-webapp-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-el-3.0-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-jsp-2.3-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-lib-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-servlet-4.0-api-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm
tomcat-webapps-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/tomcat-9.0.87-1.el8_10.7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-31651
CVE-2025-55752




Description of changes:

[1:9.0.87-1.7]
- Resolves: RHEL-124507
tomcat: Directory traversal via rewrite with possible RCE (CVE-2025-55752)
- Resolves: RHEL-91743
tomcat: Bypass of rules in Rewrite Valve (CVE-2025-31651)
